title: January 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}
'''January 24''' is the 24th day of the year. 341 days (342 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[John Romita Sr.]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Adrian Edmondson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Phil LaMarr]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Jonathan Aris]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 51|''Star Wars Weekly'' 51]] published.
*[[1982]] – [[Daveed Diggs]] is born.
*[[1983]] – ''[[Doom Mission]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1995]] – [[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[TT Games]] is founded.
*[[2007]] – [[Dark Times 2|''Dark Times'' 2]] published.
*[[2014]] – The impending closure of [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] is announced.
*[[2018]] – [[Poe Dameron 23|''Poe Dameron'' 23]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Forces of Destiny—Ahsoka & Padmé]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The New Republic Omnibus Vol. 1]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 2|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 2]] published.
*2024 – [[Thrawn: Alliances 1|''Thrawn: Alliances'' 1]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: The Manga, Vol. 3|''Star Wars: The Mandalorian Vol.'' 3]] published in Japan.
*2025 – [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: The Manga, Vol. 4|''Star Wars: The Mandalorian Vol.'' 4]] published in Japan.
<noinclude>
